output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez received a $25,000 cash security deposit upon signing a lease agreement. A security deposit is a liability because it represents an obligation to return the funds to the tenant at the end of the lease term (assuming no damages or defaults). The transaction increases Cash (asset) by $25,000 and increases Security Deposit Liability by $25,000. No revenue is recognized at this point because the deposit is refundable and not earned income. The monthly rent of $10,000 is not yet received or accrued in this transaction—this entry only records the initial security deposit receipt.
